title: Echomist: Core
description: Adds Sculk Blocks, Potions of Silence and Echo Armor Trims!
body:
![Echomist Text](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f37d1771d77265de1e707e67c33f22dfa5eb82f8.png)

---
This mod expands upon the Deep Dark by adding new uses for Sculk!

### Features
- Sculk Bricks (Including Stairs, Slabs and Walls)
- Sculk Tiles (Including Stairs, Slabs and Walls)
- Chiseled Sculk
- Sculk Pillars
- Potions of Silence
  - Can be brewed using a Sculk Sensor
  - Mutes all sounds made by an entity (walking, running, eating,...)

Echo Shards can now be used as armor trim materials!

---
### About Echomist

Echomist is an ongoing, work-in-progress mod series!
More is coming soon, development progress can be viewed on the [Discord](https://discord.gg/gRFRDhFn2p)!

This mod will not be ported to other mod loaders or versions, unless I am willing to do so.

Due to ARR licensing, you are not allowed to use any code / textures / other assets from this project. This is intentional, as I do not want my work to be used in any unrelated projects. Deciding against it, will result in me asking you to remove said assets from your project + further steps if the issue is not addressed. If you are really wanting to use certain assets, DM me on discord.

--- 
### Other Projects
[Echomist: Fractured Skies](https://modrinth.com/mod/echomist-fs) - Adds a new material, Sylvite, which focused on a healing-oriented playstyle.

[Sharpened Axes](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/sharpened-axes) - Slighly retextures all axes to be sharper.
